resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Native Innova printer driver for Intermec thermal printers using Direct Protocol.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Printing performed via installed Windows printer. Requires printer to be installed in Windows operating system.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Prints labels as image and xml content to a specified directory.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Native Innova printer driver for Sato thermal printers using SBPL command language.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Native Innova printer driver for Sato thermal printers using SBPL for CLNX command language.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Native Innova printer driver for Zebra thermal printers using ZPL-II command language.

resource.name: PrinterDriverDescription
resource.object: Native Innova printer driver for Datamax thermal printers using DPL command language.
